extra.reason: Resolved: ccusage backend, related wiring, dead multi-agent plumbing, compare_usage.swift script, and stale README documentation are removed; app code no longer references ccusage.

Resolved: blog/session usage aggregation now computes provider-aware cost_usd via ModelPricing for Anthropic and OpenAI models, with regression coverage for Codex auto-review, GPT 5.5 fast, Anthropic pricing, and unknown model behavior.
Provider enum, UsageWindowType codex cases, ProviderUsageSnapshot, TokenCount.reasoningTokens implemented; Kit builds clean

Live multi-provider token/cost done: UsageLogSource protocol, CodexLogSource, OpenCodeLogSource (SQLite), TokenUsageService aggregator with provider-aware cost + byProvider, auto-detect wiring. macOS+widgets build clean. SwiftData persistence split to follow-up.

CodexUsageService reads 5h/weekly rate-limit windows from newest rollout (used_percent/resets_at/plan_type) → ProviderUsageSnapshot. Verified vs real data: plan prolite, 5h 51%, 7d 20%. macOS builds clean.
Live multi-provider token/cost aggregator shipped (re-confirming closed).
Auto-detect wiring + Codex menu-bar toggle done; full enable/disable settings optional.
OpenUsage-style provider cards shipped on macOS (popover + dashboard). iOS/widgets → ClaudeMeter-d01.

OpenUsage-style sidebar + ProviderDetailView shipped (popover + dashboard): rail switches overview/per-provider; detail shows links, windows w/ status dots, Today/Yesterday/30d, usage-trend sparkline (bars), per-model %. Builds clean (macOS+widgets). Spark/Credits omitted (not in local logs).
Expired Codex rate-limit windows now refresh to zero usage and roll their reset timestamp forward; added focused Codex usage service tests. App build succeeds.

Compared against CodexBar, OpenUsage, upstream Codex, abtop, and local Codex rollout logs. Updated parser to map windows by window_minutes, support reset_at/reset_after_seconds variants, and added coverage for these cases. App build succeeds; test target remains blocked by stale OutageTrackingTests.
Verified OpenCode Go dashboard quota behavior and added optional dashboard parser/service integration.
Menu bar Codex indicator now prefers the 5-hour Codex quota window.
Replaced stale rollout-file parsing with live /wham/usage fetch; 6 tests pass, live value 25% (was 0%)
Removed syncToKeychain call and method from MacOSCredentialService; macOS no longer writes to its own keychain, eliminating the per-launch authorization prompt. Build succeeds.

Routed blog-sync token through /usr/bin/security CLI in BlogUsageSyncService (load/save/delete). Stable Apple-signed binary holds the keychain grant, so no per-launch prompt. Stale in-process keychain items deleted; user re-enters token once after updating. Build succeeds.
Implemented per-provider outage tracking (Claude/Codex/OpenCode) + UI indicator; fixed test target compile. Also fixed pre-existing OpenCode parser regex bug. All 168 tests pass; macOS+iOS build.
Implemented per-provider outage tracking (Claude/Codex/OpenCode) + UI indicator; fixed test target compile. Also fixed pre-existing OpenCode parser regex bug. All 168 tests pass; macOS+iOS build.
Implemented per-provider outage tracking (Claude/Codex/OpenCode) + UI indicator; fixed test target compile. Also fixed pre-existing OpenCode parser regex bug. All 168 tests pass; macOS+iOS build.
Implemented per-provider outage tracking (Claude/Codex/OpenCode) + UI indicator; fixed test target compile. Also fixed pre-existing OpenCode parser regex bug. All 168 tests pass; macOS+iOS build.
Implemented LiteLLM-backed pricing cache with proxy/hosted map refresh and wired it into token import, live aggregation, and blog sync cost calculation.

Fixed returnsNilForUnknownModel (assert static fallbackRates for gpt-4 since live LiteLLM map prices it) and initialStateIsCorrect (stash/restore cached snapshot UserDefaults keys shared with the real app). Full suite passes on Xcode 27/macOS 27.

Implemented OAuth 2.1/PKCE blog sign-in (BlogOAuthService + ASWebAuthenticationSession), wired into UsageViewModel/Settings with static token fallback. Endpoints/scopes/resource verified against ruchern.dev Better Auth provider docs. macOS build succeeds.
Implemented 1h cache tier, fast-mode premium, sidechain dedup; tiered 200K dropped (current models flat). 10 tests pass, app builds.
Closed
Closed
Closed
Closed
Per-turn granularity implemented in CodexLogSource
Closed
Closed
code_review_rate_limit surfaced as codexReviews window. additional_rate_limits[] (dynamic names) and credits (balance, not a reset window) deferred — need richer model than UsageWindow.

429 now degrades gracefully: ClaudeAPIService already retains stale data + shows retry message; added CodexError.rateLimited (429 + Retry-After) and ViewModel now keeps cached Codex/OpenCode data on rate-limit instead of hiding the column.
Reverted aeea0f7; flat pricing restored, 1h-cache 2x kept, reprice version bumped to 3. PR #15.
Added claude-sonnet-5 rate table and fallback matching in ModelPricing
Implemented providerID-based OpenCode attribution and verified with focused xcodebuild tests.
Implemented Fable weekly usage window across model, parser, UI, widgets, notifications, Live Activity, and history charts. All targets build; tests pass.

Applied /simplify fixes to c4e7c05: moved usageHistoryService out of #if os(macOS) and added UsageHistoryRepository+DailyUsageRecordEntity to iOS target membership (iOS build was broken since c4e7c05), one-shot legacy migration (actor+service flags), retention cleanup only on new-day insert, removed save: flag, dropped dead re-normalization, extracted shared existingEntity(id:) upsert helper, fixed flaky overallStatusIsOnTrackWhenNoSnapshot via cache stash/restore. macOS tests green, iOS builds.
Closed
Accumulation logic landed in generate-appcast; full 72-item history backfilled to gh-pages
Closed
Consolidated provider usage services and macOS consumers; macOS unit tests pass.
Fixed by isolating UsageViewModel and outage tests with unique UserDefaults suites; overallStatusIsOnTrackWhenNoSnapshot passed 20 consecutive iterations and the full macOS test target.

Completed focused usage orchestration refactor: extracted cache, scheduler, settings, and token coordinator; isolated defaults; macOS tests and iOS build pass; touched files lint clean; diff check clean.
Implemented and validated the manual Developer ID-signed release, notarization, Sparkle appcast, publication, repair, CI tests, and beginner documentation pipeline.

Implemented compact Claude/Codex provider groups, two-pin preferences and legacy migration, adaptive template rendering, accessibility, official provider marks, documentation, and regression coverage; 237 macOS unit tests pass.
Implemented, tested, published, and independently verified v0.26.0 build 79 through the explicit unsigned release path.
Restored default-off opt-in Claude token refresh, fail-closed Keychain persistence, active Settings toggle, and isolated policy tests; macOS unit tests, focused SwiftLint, and diff checks pass.
Implemented AgentUsage rebrand across Xcode targets, Swift package, Apple identifiers, release automation, docs, and GitHub repository; package, macOS, iOS, widget, and release tests/builds passed.
Implemented AgentUsageProviderCore contracts, generation-safe engine, bounded timeouts/retries, same-origin redirects, persistence, and strict-concurrency tests.
Implemented string-backed provider windows, legacy Codable compatibility, atomic v2 snapshots, Claude cache migration, and provider-window daily history migration.

Updated DESIGN.md and PRODUCT.md with the approved provider-neutral timefold identity, color anchors, dimensional treatment, production fidelity requirements, and separation from the existing interface palette.
Post-migration creation validated with stock bd 1.1.0.
Exact case-sensitive AgentUsage prefix migration completed and validated.

Completed four-target multiplatform consolidation. Validated project parsing/scheme listing, macOS build and 251-test suite, unified iOS build-for-testing, separate widget build, conditional embedding, plist/entitlements, and removal of obsolete target references.

Implemented local best-effort BGAppRefreshTask scheduling and refresh outcome mapping without paid-membership services. Added deterministic coordinator tests covering registration, cancellation, clamping, rescheduling, success/failure, expiration, and exactly-once completion; validated macOS tests/build, iOS build-for-testing, and widget build.
Redesigned the macOS main app window with a sidebar shell, refreshed dashboard, settings, and about surfaces; validated with Xcode BuildProject.
Removed user-facing Weather/weather station wording and validated with Xcode diagnostics and BuildProject.

Implemented duration-based Codex window classification. Weekly-only primary payload now emits codexWeekly; five-hour and weekly windows still return automatically when their 18000/604800-second durations are present; durationless payloads retain legacy slot mapping. Added parser, unknown-duration, header, restored-window, default-pin, and missing-five-hour rendering coverage. 15 Codex service tests and 13 menu-bar tests pass.
Pinned macOS destinations across release and CI, added regression coverage, and verified a signed-adhoc universal x86_64+arm64 archive plus the complete macOS test suite.
